summary: Tested full audit logging UI coverage across 5 admin tabs: Coupons (PlansTab), Forms Management, Intake Forms Builder, Webhooks, and Logs entity filter. All P0/P1/P2 features verified and passing.

T1_plans_coupons_logs_button.detail: data-testid='logs-coupon-{id}' ScrollText button present on coupon row
T1_plans_coupons_logs_button.note: Plans tab is only accessible to platform_super_admin (admin@automateaccounts.local, code: automate-accounts). The provided test credentials (mayank@automateaccounts.com) have role 'partner_super_admin' and cannot access Plans tab.

T1_coupon_audit_dialog.detail: AuditLogDialog opens with title 'Audit Logs — TESTLOGS10'

T2_forms_management_logs_button.detail: data-testid='logs-form-{id}' Logs button present for each custom form row
T2_forms_management_logs_button.note: Required creating test data (tenant_forms collection was correct, forms collection was wrong)

T2_form_audit_dialog.detail: AuditLogDialog opens with title 'Audit Logs — Test Audit Form'

T3_intake_form_builder_logs_button.detail: data-testid='intake-form-logs-{id}' ScrollText logs button present on each Intake Form Builder row

T3_intake_form_audit_dialog.detail: AuditLogDialog opens with title 'Audit Logs — Demo Onboarding Form'

T4_webhook_delivery_logs_button.detail: data-testid='webhook-logs-btn' Delivery Logs button present on webhook card

T4_webhook_audit_trail_button.detail: data-testid='webhook-audit-logs-btn' Audit Trail button present on webhook card

T4_webhook_audit_dialog.detail: AuditLogDialog opens with title 'Audit Trail — Test Audit Webhook'

T5_logs_entity_type_filter.detail: Entity type dropdown contains all 34 types including all required: coupon, intake_form, intake_form_record, webhook, form, currency (all lowercase)

critical_code_review_comments: Plans tab (Coupons section) is only accessible to platform_super_admin, not partner_super_admin. The test credentials provided (mayank@automateaccounts.com) cannot access this tab. Platform admin login requires partner_code='automate-accounts' and email='admin@automateaccounts.local'.
Webhook dialog title uses 'Audit Trail' while all other dialogs use 'Audit Logs'. This inconsistency might be intentional for webhooks vs other entities but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: Created test data for testing: (1) TESTLOGS10 coupon in coupons collection, (2) Test Audit Form in tenant_forms collection (tenant_id=6cb9c3e5-1e17-4e57-b443-564af4f5fa70), (3) Test Audit Webhook in webhooks collection with proper subscriptions structure

partner_admin.accessible_tabs: PEOPLE, COMMERCE, CONTENT, SETTINGS, INTEGRATIONS (NOT Plans/Coupons)

platform_admin.accessible_tabs: PLATFORM (Plans, Coupons), PEOPLE, COMMERCE, CONTENT, SETTINGS, INTEGRATIONS

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1/P2 audit logging UI features are verified working. Key findings: (1) Coupon logs button requires platform_super_admin login (partner_code='automate-accounts', email='admin@automateaccounts.local'). (2) All 5 new AuditLogDialog integrations work: coupons, forms, intake_forms, webhooks, logs entity filter. (3) LogsTab entity_type filter now has 34 options including all required lowercase types. Test seed data created: TESTLOGS10 coupon, Test Audit Form in tenant_forms, Test Audit Webhook in webhooks.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All audit logging buttons and dialogs implemented correctly.
